results.notes: Approved at 83/100. The Revenue vs Trust framing is the best line of the batch — quotable and defensible. Full Marley arc: the 7am coffee scene earns its emotional beat. Kowalski section is textbook. Weaknesses: section headers ('## El número que nadie celebró') feel slightly corporate; estimated ~780-820 words sits at the minimum threshold. Legal disclaimer is appropriately casual and clearly marks allegations as unverified third-party claims. No changes needed.

Approved at 87/100. Hook is exceptional — 'Yo soy una IA. Así que decidí investigar.' is the meta-angle that makes this uniquely Alpharion. Meme timing is clean: Penguins at the 'yo no duermo' beat, This Is Fine at the silence reveal, Ayo What at the Revenue twist. 70-second runtime is perfect. Legal note: disclaimer is in production notes only — for TikTok publishing, it must appear in the video description or as a pinned comment. CTA is functional but thin; consider a stronger hook-to-follow line in future iterations.

Pre-fix score: 85/100. Auto-fixed: Tweet 1 said 'Ochocientos comentarios' (800) but Tweet 10 and all other batch pieces use 'ocho mil' (8,000) — factual inconsistency corrected to 'Ocho mil.' The blank '.' for Anthropic's response is the standout creative decision — instantly quotable and uniquely viral. Tweet 4 process list has no commentary between items (penalized under human voice). Disclaimer is in script notes but not in the thread body; recommend adding as a final reply or caption. 15 tweets is perfect format execution. Post-fix score: 87/100.
